title: erythroxylum coca var. ipadu
intro: Erythroxylum coca var. ipadu is a variety of the coca plant, a type of evergreen shrub native to the Andean region of South America. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Erythroxylum coca var. ipadu are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically dried and steeped in hot water to make a tea, or infused in oil to create a topical remedy.
